mapper.select: SELECT d.CHECKIN_ID AS checkinId, d.SOURCE_TYPE AS sourceType, d.DRUG_ID AS drugId, d.DRUG_NAME AS drugName, d.DOSAGE AS dosage, d.TAKEN AS taken, d.IMAGE_OBJECT_KEY AS imageObjectKey, r.RECORD_TIME AS recordTime FROM CHECKIN_RECORDS r INNER JOIN CHECKIN_MEDICATION_DETAILS d ON r.CHECKIN_ID = d.CHECKIN_ID WHERE r.USER_ID = #{userId} AND r.CHECKIN_TYPE = 3 AND r.CHECKIN_DATE = #{checkinDate} AND r.DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY r.RECORD_TIME DESC
